title: AFTER SCHOOL SKATE PROGRAM - 211info
text: PUSH MOVEMENT AFTER SCHOOL SKATE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an after-school youth skateboarding program that teaches basic skills and fosters community and wellness. May also provide snacks. 831 SE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Youth attending participating schools Hours: Varies by location Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Email or visit website for information or to see current list of participating schools FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports * Youth Issues Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
